description: Delegates authority to an agent, ERC-8004 compatible

agentAccountId.description: CAIP-10 account ID for the agent. Alternative to agentWallet + agentChainRef.

agentChainRef.description: CAIP-2 chain reference when using agentWallet

agentWallet.description: EVM (0x + 40 hex chars) or Solana (Base58, 32-44 chars) address

allowedPaymentTypes.description: Declared payment protocols (e.g. ["x402"]). Defaults to ["x402"] when scope is payments:x402.

controllerAccountId.description: CAIP-10 account ID for the controller. Alternative to controllerWallet + controllerChainRef. Must match signer.

controllerChainRef.description: CAIP-2 chain reference when using controllerWallet

controllerWallet.description: EVM (0x + 40 hex chars) or Solana (Base58, 32-44 chars) address. Must match the request signer.

expiresAt.description: Expiration timestamp in Unix milliseconds. Server rejects delegations expired more than 30s ago.

instructions.description: Instructions for the delegated agent (max 4000 chars)

maxSpend.description: Maximum spend in wei (decimal string, e.g. "1000000000000000000" for 1 ETH)

receiptDisclosure.description: How much of receipt/action payload may be disclosed. Defaults to "summary" when scope is payments:x402.

skills.description: Declared skill identifiers granted to the agent (each max 64 chars, max 48 entries)

title: agent-delegation
